title: Bridge Atlas - Episode 4: Alignment | Emmett Shear & Alex Stokes
description:
Artificial intelligence and protocols are evil twins. We invited one guest from each field to talk about alignment, coordination, and the limits of these technologies. What bridges can we build between them to make both better? If one evil twin took over, what would that look like? Emmett Shear is the CEO of Softmax and former CEO of Twitch and OpenAI. Alex Stokes runs protocol coordination for the Ethereum Foundation alongside Tim Beiko, who featured in episode one of Bridge Atlas.

Sign up for Bridge Atlas Day at Devconnect: https://devconnect.org/calendar?event=bridge-atlas
